mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败，无法测试。项目需要 yarn 4（packageManager: yarn@4.13.0），yarn install 两次均超时被 kill（依赖量大+网络慢）。改用 npm install --legacy-peer-deps 后构建失败：缺少 @sourceacademy/language-directory 和 @sourceacademy/plugin-directory 模块（yarn workspace 特定包，npm 无法解析）。rsbuild dev 报 4 个 Module not found 错误，服务未启动。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Deploy failed. yarn 4 install timed out twice. npm fallback missing workspace packages. Build failed with 4 Module not found errors.
